<!--
  Thanks for contributing to hotrulez!
  PRs are squash-merged, so your PR title must follow Conventional Commits, e.g.
    feat(completion): offer request.auth.token members
    fix(formatter): keep multiline conditions split
  See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / tooling (`refactor:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for my change where it affects lexer, parser, formatter, diagnostics, or symbol intelligence.
- [ ] Diagnostic wording (if changed) stays structural and never claims a rule is "secure".
- [ ] I updated the README / docs if behavior or usage changed.
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under the project's [MIT License](https://github.com/lezli01/hotrulez/blob/master/LICENSE).
